name: critic_well_grounded_answer_accepts
description: Synthesizer emits a single fact claim ('A1c was 7.4% on 2026-01-15') cited against a present packet, no dose-change verbs. The critic must ACCEPT and the verifier should produce a passed VerifiedResponse with one accepted claim.
what_bug_this_catches: Pins the critic's happy path. If the critic becomes overly aggressive (e.g., regex matches 'was' as dose-change, or empty source_ids check fires on a populated list), a clean grounded brief gets rejected and clinicians see safe-refusals on routine A1c-trend questions.
